summary: Diagram application with free transform tool for icons and text labels

existing_features.title: Implement a free transform tool that allows users to select and move both icons and their associated text labels together as a single unit on the AttackPathCanvas
Add resize functionality to the free transform tool that allows users to scale icons on the diagram using corner and edge handles
Create visual feedback for the free transform tool showing selection state, including a bounding box or selection outline around selected icons and their labels

new_feature_requests.summary: Free transform tool to move icons and text labels
Free transform tool to resize icons on diagram
